name: quarto-slide-remote
description: iPhone remote control + speaker-notes companion for static reveal.js decks

scripts.deploy: bun run build:plugin && bun run build:phone && cd packages/worker && bunx wrangler deploy
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p packages/protocol && tsc --noEmit -p packages/deck-plugin && tsc --noEmit -p packages/phone-ui && tsc --noEmit -p packages/worker
